summary: Ukrainian operators from the 9th "Kairos" squadron of the 414th "Hungarian Birds" regiment struck two Iskander OTRK bases in Crimea on the night of April 16, part of a broader 16-target strike that also included air defense systems, oil depots, and logistics nodes. Meanwhile, the Rubicon Center reported 105 enemy targets destroyed on April 16 and 107 on April 15, focusing on Donbas, Sumy, Belgorod, and Krasny Liman, including fixed-wing UAVs and personnel. On the ground, FPV drones were used to kill Russian soldiers during assaults and after a fake surrender attempt, while Ukrainian forces in the Kostiantynivka sector survived an FPV attack after detecting the drone with a handheld detector. Ukrainian electronic warfare was also observed issuing mock surrender warnings to force enemy drones to land.
